login.subtitle: Symbio Mothership
login.error.tooManyAttempts: Zu viele Versuche. Versuchen Sie es später erneut.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
fileManager.title: Dateimanager
fileManager.name: Name
fileManager.empty: Verzeichnis ist leer oder nicht zugänglich.
settings.title: Einstellungen
server.info.description: Complete system profile including operating system details, CPU specifications, memory totals, boot time, and uptime. Values are read live from /proc and /sys.
server.processes.description: All running processes sorted by resident memory usage, read live from /proc. Use the search below to filter by command name, owner, or PID.
server.processes.none: No processes found or agent is unavailable.
server.ports.description: All listening TCP and UDP sockets with their bound addresses, ports, and the owning process where /proc file descriptors can be resolved. Search by process name, port number, or protocol.
server.memory.paraDescription: Complete /proc/meminfo breakdown showing every kernel-reported memory field with a short description.
server.memory.noData: Keine Speicherdaten verfügbar oder Agent nicht verfügbar.
server.users.description: Active user sessions detected on the host. Data is parsed from /var/run/utmp and shows traditional login sessions (not SSH daemon accounting).
server.packages.description: All installed Debian packages read from dpkg status on the host. Search by package name. {{total}} packages installed.
server.packages.none: No packages found or agent is unavailable.
server.storage.description: All detected mounted filesystems with usage bars, plus cumulative read/write counters per disk device from /proc/diskstats.
server.networking.description: Every detected network interface with its operational state, hardware address, link speed, assigned addresses, and received/transmitted byte counters. Values are refreshed with each agent collection.
server.charts.description: CPU average and per-core, memory, and root disk usage over the selected time window. Historical data is retained for 7 days.
server.recentData.description: The most recent 50 monitoring samples collected by the agent. Each row represents one complete collection cycle.
profile.title: Profil
application.detail.deletedMessage: Diese Anwendung ist gelöscht und wird nicht mehr überprüft.
application.detail.deleteConfirm: Überwachung beenden und diese Anwendung löschen?
application.form.responseMatchHelp: JavaScript-Regex ohne / Trennzeichen. Wird gegen die ersten 64 KB der Antwort geprüft.
application.form.tagsHelp: Wählen Sie vorhandene Tags oder geben Sie ein neues ein. Ohne JavaScript kommagetrennte Namen eingeben; maximal zehn Tags.
application.log.form.pathHelp: Nur dieser registrierte Pfad kann gelesen werden. Verzeichnisse, Traversal, Symlinks, Docker-Logs und PM2-Logs werden abgelehnt.
application.log.viewer.searchHelp: Durchsucht nur die neuesten 8 MB. Zeigt bis zu fünf Treffer mit zehn Zeilen Kontext. Reguläre Ausdrücke werden nicht unterstützt.
application.log.search.title: Wörtliche Logsuche
application.log.search.caseHelp: Case-sensitiver wörtlicher Text; nur neueste 8 MB.
application.source.form.pathHelp: Nur dieses registrierte Verzeichnis kann geöffnet werden. Traversal, Symlinks und Shell-Zugriff werden abgelehnt.
tags.form.name: Tagname
installation.betaHttpWarning: Beta-HTTP-Warnung: öffentlicher Zugriff auf {{publicBinding}} ist unverschlüsselt. HTTPS ist vor der Produktionsnutzung zwingend erforderlich.
installation.hardeningDetail: Nicht-Root, schreibgeschützte Dateisysteme, entfernte Fähigkeiten, keine neuen Berechtigungen.
installation.systemdDetail: Nicht verfügbar: Kein system D-Bus-Socket gemountet.
user.form.roleInfo: Rolle: **Admin** *(nur Admin-Rolle ist für neue Benutzer verfügbar. Superadmin ist exklusiv für den ursprünglichen Systembenutzer.)*

docker.description: Docker-Container-Laufzeit – überwacht, ob der Docker-Daemon auf dem Host verfügbar ist.

mysql.description: MySQL- oder MariaDB-Datenbankserver – schreibgeschützter Status, Schema-Browsing und Tabellendaten-Viewer.
mysql.tables.none: Keine Tabellen in dieser Datenbank gefunden.
mysql.browse.noData: Keine Daten zurückgegeben oder Tabelle ist leer.

apache.description: Apache-HTTP-Server – die am weitesten verbreitete Webserver-Software.
servers.name: Name
service.form.dbHelpIntro1: Symbio liest Ihre Datenbank schreibgeschützt — es durchsucht nur Schemas, Tabellenstrukturen und Daten. Es werden keine Daten geändert.
service.form.dbHelpIntro2: Sie können das root-Konto verwenden, falls es bereits existiert, oder einen dedizierten schreibgeschützten Benutzer erstellen:
service.form.dbHelpMySQLHint: Geben Sie dann symbio als Benutzername und Ihr Passwort im obigen Formular ein.
service.form.dbHelpPSQLHint: Geben Sie dann symbio als Benutzername und Ihr Passwort im obigen Formular ein.
service.form.dbHelpTip: Tipp: Sie können auch das root-Konto verwenden, wenn es bereits ein Passwort hat. Symbio führt nur Leseoperationen durch.
service.form.unsupportedHelp: Nicht unterstützte Felder werden von Adaptern ignoriert, die sie nicht verwenden.
settings.serverTimezoneHelp: Dieser Server ist auf die oben angezeigte Zeitzone eingestellt. Die Zeitzone gilt für alle geplanten Aufgaben und Berichte. Das Ändern der Server-Zeitzone erfordert Systemadministratorzugriff außerhalb von Symbio.

server.detail.noStorage: No usable filesystem inventory received yet.
server.detail.noNetworking: No active interface inventory received yet.
server.detail.manageServicesHint: View and manage all server services

services.evidenceNote: Service status always includes its evidence type. "Detected" is not equivalent to a successful protocol health check.

settings.languagePlaceholder: English is the only language available in Phase 1. Additional settings are planned.
settings.restrictedMessage: User management is restricted to superadmin accounts.
settings.llmSecretKeyHelp: Your API secret key. Stored securely and never exposed to the browser.
settings.llmEndpointHelp: Leave blank to use the default endpoint for the selected provider.
user.form.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep current password.
profile.passwordHelp: Leave blank to keep current password.
installation.title: Installation Status
validation.slugRequired: Internal name must be a 3–64 character slug.
server.logs.title: Application Logs
server.logs.description: All registered application log sources for this server, across every application.
server.logs.noLogs: No application log sources configured for this server.
server.serverLogs.title: Server Logs
server.serverLogs.description: System-level log files read directly from the host — syslog, authentication, kernel, and boot logs.
server.serviceLogs.title: Service Logs
server.serviceLogs.description: Predefined service log paths for common services installed on the host — Docker, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Nginx, and Apache.
server.symbioLogs.title: Symbio Logs
server.symbioLogs.description: Self-monitoring logs from the Symbio platform — mothership dashboard and host agent.
settings.llmModelHelp: Select a model for this provider. Choose 'Other model...' to type a custom model name.
settings.llmThinkingToggle: Enable thinking / reasoning mode (DeepSeek only, ignored by other providers)
settings.llmUsageReset: Token usage counter has been reset.
ai.runStarted: Skill run started — check Running Tasks and recent activity for results.
ai.fixGuideDone: I've Done This — Mark as Fixed
ai.fixContextToggle: View raw data the AI used for this guide (debugging)
ai.handleNotePlaceholder: e.g. This is my dev server, the port is intentionally open. Not malware.
ai.handleNoteHelp: Your note is saved to the skill's memory. The AI reads it in future runs to provide better context.
ai.handleSuppress: Suppress future alerts with the same pattern
ai.includeContext: Include server context (improves accuracy, uses more tokens)
ai.questionPlaceholder: Ask a question about this log (e.g. What caused these errors?)
ai.notConfigured: AI analysis requires an LLM API key. Configure it under
ai.discover.title: AI Application Discovery
ai.discover.intro1: This wizard uses artificial intelligence to scan your server and discover web applications running on it.
ai.discover.intro2: The AI will analyze your running processes, listening ports, and installed packages to suggest applications.
ai.discover.introStep1: AI scans your server and suggests applications
ai.discover.introStep2: You select which applications to add
ai.discover.introStep3: You confirm log files and directories for each app
ai.discover.introStep4: Selected applications are created with your confirmed settings
ai.discover.introHuman: AI assists with discovery — every decision is confirmed by you before being applied.
ai.discover.anthropicWarning: Application discovery requires DeepSeek or OpenAI. Please switch your LLM provider in
ai.discover.parseError: The AI response could not be parsed as structured data. You can review the raw response below and still add applications manually.
ai.discover.noApps: No web applications were detected on this server. You can add applications manually.
ai.discover.configureHelp: For each selected application, confirm which suggested directory and log files are correct. Uncheck any that are incorrect.
ai.discover.noDirSuggestion: No directory suggestion from AI. Enter one manually if needed.
ai.discover.noLogSuggestion: No log file suggestions from AI. Add them manually if needed.
ai.symbioIntelligenceDesc: AI-powered tools and history for log analysis and application discovery.
ai.historyDesc: Browse and review past AI queries and responses.
ai.usageDesc: View token usage and LLM configuration.
ai.viewRequest: View Original Request Sent to AI
ai.requestHelp: This is the full text sent to the AI model, including system prompt, server context, log content, and question. Shown for transparency.
ai.clearConfirm: Delete all AI history entries? This cannot be undone.
ai.noHistory: No AI history entries yet. Ask a question about a log to see it here.
ai.llmNotConfigured: LLM is not configured. Skills require an AI provider. Configure in
ai.noPendingActions: No pending actions. All skill suggestions have been reviewed.
ai.actionDone: Marked as handled. This finding may reappear if the condition recurs.
settings.skill.cleanDepthLight: Light — logs and home caches only
settings.skill.cleanDepthDeep: Deep — full system sweep, including Docker/spool
settings.skill.cleanDepthHelp: Controls which directories are scanned and how aggressively files are targeted.
settings.skill.memoryHelp: The AI reads this context before each analysis and can write to it. You can edit or clear it anytime.
settings.skill.intensityModerate: Moderate — also clean old logs and temp files
settings.skill.logSources: Log sources to scan (one per line)
settings.skill.checkAuthLog: Check auth log for brute force attempts
settings.skill.checkPorts: Check ports for malware/common hacking ports
settings.skill.maxAuthLogLines: Max auth log lines to scan
settings.skill.ignorePatternsHelp: One pattern per line. Findings matching any pattern will be automatically filtered.
settings.skill.checkIntervalHelp: How often the skill checks for new data. Default varies per skill (e.g. 15 min for Uptime Police, 1h for SUS Finder).
ai.actionAcknowledged: Dismissed — pattern added to ignore list. Same finding will not reappear.
ai.actionPatternIgnored: Pattern added to ignore list. All matching actions rejected.
setupWizard.subtitle: Symbio Intelligence
setupWizard.intro: Symbio is your DevOps AI assistant. It handles package updates, storage cleanup, uptime monitoring, and error scanning so you can focus on the complex work. Let's get set up in two quick steps.
setupWizard.aiIntro: Symbio Intelligence needs an LLM to power its automated skills. You can change these settings anytime.
setupWizard.apiKeyHelp: Your API key is stored securely and used only for AI analysis requests.
setupWizard.endpointHelp: Leave blank to use the default endpoint for your provider.
settings.llmLanguageHelp: The AI will respond in this language. Falls back to English if unavailable.
settings.llmPersonalityHelp: Controls the tone and style of the AI's responses.
settings.llmCustomInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. Always use bullet points. Be very detailed.
settings.llmCustomInstructionHelp: Optional: additional instructions appended to every AI request. Use this to set consistent preferences (e.g. formatting, tone, depth).
setupWizard.aiPrefIntro: Set your AI response preferences. These can be changed later in Settings.
settings.themeHelp: Choose a color scheme for the dashboard interface.
alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.name: Name
alerts.thresholdValueHelp: Set to 0 for load metrics to auto-calculate from CPU cores.
alerts.durationSecondsHelp: How long the condition must persist before firing.
alerts.cooldownSecondsHelp: Minimum time before the same rule can fire again.
alerts.diagnosticEnabledHelp: Fetch top CPU/memory processes when this alert fires.
alerts.statusCheckHelp: Alert fires when ALL probes in the duration window match one of the selected statuses.
settings.messagingWebhookHelp: Create an Incoming Webhook in Slack and paste the URL here.
settings.messagingNoChannels: No notification channels configured. Add one to start receiving alert notifications.
ai.dismissAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to dismiss all pending actions? Their patterns will be added to ignore lists.
setupWizard.enableJsForCustomModel: Enable JavaScript to use a custom model name.
settings.messagingNameHelp: A friendly label to identify this channel in alert rule forms.
settings.messagingSlackChannelHelp: Override the Slack channel (e.g. #general, #alerts, or @username). Leave blank to use the webhook default.
settings.messagingSlackUsernameHelp: Custom display name for the bot (e.g. Symbio Bot). Leave blank for Slack default.
settings.messagingSlackIconEmojiHelp: Custom emoji icon for the bot (e.g. :robot_face:). Leave blank for Slack default.
